channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: UN chief says ‘high time’ to end ‘out of control’ war on Iran
item.description: UN Chief Antonio Guterres has said that the conflict in the Middle East is “out of control”.

item.title: Iran’s state TV outlines five conditions to end war
item.description: Iran’s state TV has set out a list of five demands it says must be met before the country will agree to end of the war.

item.title: Palestine Action hunger strikers to sue prisons over alleged mistreatment
item.description: Activists plan to take legal action against the UK prisons that allegedly mistreated them.

item.title: What we know about US attack on Iraqi military site
item.description: Iraqi authorities say a US air strike on a military site in Anbar killed seven soldiers and wounded 13.

item.title: Protest in India over cooking gas crisis
item.description: Indian opposition parties have staged a protest over the shortage of cooking gas triggered by the war on Iran.

item.title: Deadly US attack on Iraqi military base sparks condemnation
item.description: The US killed seven Iraqi soldiers in a strike in Iraq as it targeted the Popular Mobilisation Forces.

item.title: What it would take to end the Iran war
item.description: The termination of the US-Israeli war on Iran would require solid guarantees and a credible guarantor.

item.title: Is war turning Tehran’s air into a chemical weapon?
item.description: Black rain follows Tehran oil strikes, spreading toxic fallout into air, soil and water.

item.title: Iran, Nigeria, and Africa’s oil dependency
item.description: Could this be the moment Africa breaks its dependency on foreign energy?

item.title: War on Iran: What troops is the US moving to the Gulf?
item.description: Growing US military presence around Iran suggests shift from air campaign to potential ground operations.
